6:
SELECT
    AVG(CASE WHEN c1.Segment = 'SME' AND c2.Segment = 'LAM' THEN y1.Consumption - y2.Consumption END) AS SME_LAM_diff,
    AVG(CASE WHEN c1.Segment = 'LAM' AND c2.Segment = 'KAM' THEN y1.Consumption - y2.Consumption END) AS LAM_KAM_diff,
    AVG(CASE WHEN c1.Segment = 'KAM' AND c2.Segment = 'SME' THEN y1.Consumption - y2.Consumption END) AS KAM_SME_diff
FROM yearmonth y1
JOIN customers c1 ON y1.CustomerID = c1.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth y2 ON y1.Date = y2.Date
JOIN customers c2 ON y2.CustomerID = c2.CustomerID
WHERE y1.Date LIKE '2013-%'
AND c1.Currency = 'CZK'
AND y1.Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013-%' AND CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'CZK'))
AND c2.Currency = 'CZK'
AND y2.Consumption = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013-%' AND CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'CZK'))
AND c1.Segment < c2.Segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 AS GrowthPercentage
FROM
    yearmonth y
JOIN
    customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
JOIN
    transactions_1k t ON y.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND y.Date = strftime('%Y-%m-%d', t.Date)
WHERE
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    AND strftime('%Y', y.Date) IN ('2012', '2013')
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    GrowthPercentage DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O' AND b.bond_type = 'single'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS subquery;	----- bird -----	toxicology

FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) AS single_bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'single' AND m.label = 'carcinogenic'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS bonded_molecules
JOIN (
    SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS carc_count
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label = 'carcinogenic'

) AS carc_molecules ON bonded_molecules.molecule_id = carc_molecules.molecule_id
WHERE single_bond_count > 0;	----- bird -----	toxicology

JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.type = 'withdrawal'
  AND t.date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-01-31'
  AND t.operation != 'credit card'
GROUP BY d.district_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 10;	----- bird -----	financial

FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card cd ON d.disp_id = cd.disp_id
JOIN trans t ON d.account_id = t.account_id

)	----- bird -----	financial

492:
SELECT
    (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 /
     NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END), 0)) - 100 AS growth_rate
FROM
    loan l
JOIN
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN
    disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN
    client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE
    c.gender = 'M' AND strftime('%Y', l.date) IN ('1996', '1997');	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.district_id = c.district_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'female'
AND c.birth_date = (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date)
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'female' AND district_id = c.district_id
)
AND d.A12 = (
    SELECT MIN(A12)
    FROM district
    WHERE district_id = d.district_id
);	----- bird -----	financial

497:
SELECT
    c.client_id,
    c.gender,
    c.birth_date,
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date) AS age,
    cr.card_id,
    cr.type AS card_type,
    cr.issued AS card_issued_date
FROM
    client c
JOIN
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN
    card cr ON d.disp_id = cr.disp_id
WHERE
    cr.type = 'credit'
    AND c.birth_date IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    age DESC;	----- bird -----	financial
